blocks.text: looked up once after Cade walked away. Then looked back at the water. She had heard everything and kept it.
had filed it. The kind of debt people carry isn't only financial.
watched Marcus straighten slightly. He'd been right — Marcus hadn't liked what Cade had said.
watched Cade walk away and kept it without naming it.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Sophie's drying off. Needed five minutes.

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: Five minutes for you or five minutes from her?

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: You seem settled. You didn't always.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: College was a long time ago.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: You doing okay? You seem â€” I don't know. Thoughtful.

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: Being back with everyone. It just makes you think about how much time passes.

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: There you are. I've been looking everywhere.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Five feet from where you left me.
Nadia smiled when Sophie arrived. She looked at the water immediately after.

blocks.prompt: What did Nadia mean â€” how much time passes?

options.label: She's nostalgic. Reunions do that to people.
She was measuring. How settled he is. How far gone.
She already knew the answer before she asked.
